_comment: Single source of truth for project state. Update this file when milestone progress changes, then run: python scripts/sync-claude-md.py

list.name: ServiceManager
list.description: HTTP client, service health checking, gateway fallback routing

list.name: GameState
list.description: Global game state (player, ship, inventory, progress, economy)

list.name: SaveManager
list.description: Save/load to JSON files (5 slots + autosave)

list.name: StoryService
list.description: Dynamic Story Engine client (Memory Manager, World State)

advanced_systems.name: Magentic UI System
advanced_systems.features: 4 AI personalities (ATLAS, Companion, MENTOR, CHIEF), adaptive layouts, context-aware interjections

advanced_systems.name: Dynamic Story Engine
advanced_systems.description: AI-powered contextual narrative generation with memory
advanced_systems.features: Memory Manager (last 100 choices), World State (economy, factions), Mission Pool (random missions)

advanced_systems.name: Hybrid Economy System
advanced_systems.features: PartRegistry (720+ lines, 30+ methods), 39 parts defined, story-driven unlocks

advanced_systems.name: Advanced Networking
advanced_systems.description: Gateway fallback with concurrency control and retry logic
advanced_systems.features: Gateway (17010) with automatic fallback, max 2 concurrent requests, exponential backoff retry

missions.description: Tutorial mission 'The Inheritance' with ATLAS AI commentary

documentation.reports_directory: Implementation history separated from design docs
